nasb.text: For You have girded me with strength for battle; You have subdued under me those who rose up against me.

esv.text: For you equipped me with strength for the battle; you made those who rise against me sink under me.

cnv.text: 你以能力給我束腰，使我能夠作戰； 你又使那些起來攻擊我的人都屈服在我的腳下。

ccb.text: 你赐我征战的能力， 使我的仇敌降服在我脚下。

csbs.text: 你以能力装备我去争战， 又使兴起敌对我的人跪在我下面。
